Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 23 

ENRL_SRC 

LABEL: Enrollment Source 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the source of enrollment data. 

SHORT NAME: ENRL_SRC 

LONG NAME: ENRL_SRC 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: CCW 

VALUES: EDB = Enrollment Database 
CME = Common Medicare Environment
